vocab.example: I've recently dabbled in macro photography to reveal the intricate details of insects and flower petals.
I have a strong preference for monochrome images because they strip away distractions and focus on raw emotion.
While some like spontaneity, I enjoy creating staged portraits where every element of the background is meticulously planned.
To capture the silky movement of waterfalls, I often take long-exposure shots using a tripod.
My Instagram feed is mostly comprised of architectural marvels that I encountered during my travels across Europe.

vocab.meaning: sự chân thực trần trụi/góc cạnh
vocab.example: In my street photography, I aim for a sense of gritty realism rather than trying to make everything look perfect.

vocab.meaning: sự đan xen của các bề mặt/chất liệu
vocab.example: I'm fascinated by the play of textures, such as the contrast between smooth glass and weathered concrete.

vocab.meaning: góc nhìn từ trên cao (thường dùng drone)
vocab.example: Using a drone has allowed me to capture an aerial perspective of the coastline that was previously impossible to see.

vocab.meaning: độ sâu trường ảnh (độ mờ hậu cảnh)
vocab.example: I love playing with a shallow depth of field to make the subject pop against a beautifully blurred background.
Landscape photography is all about patience and chasing that fleeting light during the blue hour.
